element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player always has this; establishes baseline offensive capability

element_introduction_order.element: Power-up drops from Barraxian Artillery Gunships
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Requires destroying specific enemy types to acquire weapon variants
First of four distinct weapon upgrades available
Two-way firing capability; tactical positioning advantage
Sideways firing; requires lateral positioning strategy
Resource management; screen-clear capability; earned via squadron destruction
Stationary threats; teach pattern recognition and positioning
Mobile enemies; dropping Nova Bombs when entire squadron eliminated
Increasing enemy diversity; genetically-engineered living weapons
Two varieties; substantial health; pattern-based attacks
Culmination encounter; tests mastery of all learned mechanics
Optional scoring; marked by small green X's; 1,000 points each

typical_relief_triggers: Acquiring weapon power-ups from destroyed cargo vehicles
Successfully eliminating enemy squadrons for Nova Bomb rewards
Clearing ground installations from immediate threat zones
typical_tension_triggers: Boss-level fights (robotic machines, giant faces, Nova Cruiser)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Ultra-fast playing speed with rapid-fire animation; continuous stream of enemies requiring constant vigilance; tension builds toward level-end boss encounters and releases upon weapon acquisition

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Jewel caches (green X markers) scattered throughout levels; collectible but non-essential to progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic ground installations and simple enemy formations; unlimited projectile weapon establishes baseline safety
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of fighter squadrons, varied vehicles, and first boss encounters (robotic terror machines); weapon variety becomes strategic choice
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multiple boss types in succession; genetically-engineered living weapons; culminates in Nova Cruiser final boss requiring mastery of all mechanics
notable_spikes: First robotic terror machine boss encounter

notable_level_patterns.description: Early levels feature clusters of stationary gun turrets and launch platforms requiring precise positioning and sustained fire
Mobile four-craft formations of Barrax fighters that reward full elimination with Nova Bomb drops; encourages commitment to enemy patterns
Giant face terrain features serve as visual level-end markers and boss encounters; environmental integration of threat
Access to 25 total weapon variants through cargo vehicle destruction; creates recurring decision points about weapon loadouts
